'''wadovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:micellarisation|micellarisation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-d-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:micellarisation|micellarisation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wadovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wædeveth|wædeveth]] || [[word:wædevej|wædevej]] || [[word:wædevesh|wædevesh]] || [[word:wædeve|wædeve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wadodovoth|wadodovoth]] || [[word:wadodovoj|wadodovoj]] || [[word:wadodovosh|wadodovosh]] || [[word:wadodovo|wadodovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wadovoth|wadovoth]] || [[word:wadovoj|wadovoj]] || [[word:wadovosh|wadovosh]] || [[word:wadovo|wadovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wadofvoth|wadofvoth]] || [[word:wadofvoj|wadofvoj]] || [[word:wadofvosh|wadofvosh]] || [[word:wadofvof|wadofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wadovotho|wadovotho]] || [[word:wadovojo|wadovojo]] || [[word:wadovosho|wadovosho]] || [[word:wadovoko|wadovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wadovoth|wadovoth]] || [[word:wadovoj|wadovoj]] || [[word:wadovosh|wadovosh]] || [[word:wadovo|wadovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wadovothol|wadovothol]] || [[word:wadovojol|wadovojol]] || [[word:wadovoshol|wadovoshol]] || [[word:wadovokol|wadovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wadovothotho|wadovothotho]] || [[word:wadovojojo|wadovojojo]] || [[word:wadovoshosho|wadovoshosho]] || [[word:wadovoko|wadovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wadovothon|wadovothon]] || [[word:wadovojon|wadovojon]] || [[word:wadovoshon|wadovoshon]] || [[word:wadovokon|wadovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wadovothoro|wadovothoro]] || [[word:wadovojoro|wadovojoro]] || [[word:wadovoshoro|wadovoshoro]] || [[word:wadovokoro|wadovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
